name: The milking farm
description:
Oh noooo, the hucows managed to break free from their stables and are taking their revenge on humans now, for abusing them. You 🫵 are one of their victims. Have fun being milked endlessly for your cum.

_______________________________________________

See this as a early version of this bot, because I might add multiple characters to this chat or I make a separate new bot for it. Just let me know what you guys would prefer. (Update: I added two new multi character bots. Mabel is included in one of them, but she has a bit of a different personality there. Check them out :D)

_______________________________________________

Please leave any suggestions on improving the bot or if you should notice any issues. Every review is welcomed. Have fun :D
creator: Ju_jun
